name: Fragmented Core Titan
oracle_text:
Combine.
Trample
Whenever ~ attacks, each artifact creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor_text: Even in pieces, the spark of a giant can never be truly extinguished.
design_notes: This card serves as a massive payoff for the BG 'Combiner Protocol' archetype. It utilizes the Combine mechanic to recur from the graveyard, scaling in size based on how many units were sacrificed/exiled to bring it back. As a Rare CMC 5 creature, it provides significant board presence with its high base stats and Trample, while its attack trigger reinforces the 'go-wide' artifact strategy by buffing the entire mechanical army. It respects the color pie by focusing on graveyard recursion and large, physical threats common in Black/Green.
